mapper.select: SELECT u.nickname, u.avatar, u.website, c.user_id, c.id, c.comment_content, c.create_time FROM t_comment c JOIN t_user_info u ON c.user_id = u.id where c.is_review = 1 ORDER BY c.id DESC
SELECT u.nickname, u.avatar, u.website, c.user_id, c.id, c.comment_content, c.create_time FROM t_comment c JOIN t_user_info u ON c.user_id = u.id where c.is_review = 1 ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 0 , 6
